Metadata.title: Samuel Sean | Software Engineer & AI
Metadata.description: Professional portfolio of Samuel Sean Fotsing Tagatsing, an engineering student passionate about software engineering and artificial intelligence.

Hero.description: I design clean, expressive and high-performance web experiences, with a strong interest in artificial intelligence and software engineering.

About.title: About me
About.description: Engineering student passionate about the intersection of software engineering and artificial intelligence. Based in Yaoundé, Cameroon, I build robust, useful and visually polished digital experiences.

education.title: Engineering degree in computer science
education.institution: ENSPY (National Advanced School of Engineering of Yaoundé)
education.desc: High-level training in engineering, algorithms and complex systems.

Skills.title: Technical skills
Skills.description: A foundation in engineering, data and interfaces enhanced by a more expressive presentation, with animations that reveal progress, rhythm and the complementarity of each skill.

languages.description: Strong fundamentals for algorithms, logic and software design.

frontend.title: Frontend & design

soft.title: Soft skills
